request.description: Fetch single tax return entry by ID with all related information.
Fetch a single tax return's uploaded documents by client and year.
Returns statistics about tax returns for the current user.
Updates a specific tax return entry and its related information.
Deletes tax return by ID along with all associated data.

formdata.description: (Required) JSON string containing the full CreateTaxHubDto payload. Example: {"individual":{...}}

request.description: Returns total, pending, overdue, and completed task counts for the dashboard summary cards.
Fetches a single task by ID with all related details.
Updates a specific task. All fields are optional — only provided fields will be updated.
Deletes a task by ID. Only the admin who created the task can delete it.
Creates a new task with category, priority, due date, and assignment.

query.description: Filter by due date (This can only be one of CANCLED,DONE,PENDING)
Filter by priority (This can only be one of HIGHT,LOW)

request.description: Returns a paginated list of tasks. Supports search, filter by status/priority/category.
